mapper.sql: id, sample_bal_id, model_no, quantity, company_id, version, del_flag, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, proportion
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.sample_bal_property_assign
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into dbo.sample_bal_property_assign
id,
sample_bal_id,
model_no,
quantity,
company_id,
version,
del_flag,
create_time,
create_user,
update_time,
update_user,
proportion,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{sampleBalId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{proportion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.sample_bal_property_assign
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sample_bal_id = #{record.sampleBalId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
company_id = #{record.companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
proportion = #{record.proportion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.sample_bal_property_assign set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sample_bal_id = #{record.sampleBalId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, company_id = #{record.companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proportion = #{record.proportion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.sample_bal_property_assign
sample_bal_id = #{sampleBalId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
proportion = #{proportion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.sample_bal_property_assign set sample_bal_id = #{sampleBalId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proportion = #{proportion,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
